resend_safety_assessment: A resend of the same Waffo event id should be idempotent because the webhook handler upserts processed_webhooks and webhook_events on mode,event_type,event_id, then returns 200 DUPLICATE_ALREADY_PROCESSED when processed_at is already set. Orders and payments are also protected by unique constraints on mode plus Waffo ids.

legacy_verification_event.processing_error: Unable to resolve billing context for order.completed
legacy_verification_event.note: This older generic verification ping was recorded before the paid LeadFill event was successfully processed. It does not block the current paid-order path.
